Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: We bring in a 2001 ragged out BMW 4 door sedan, with plans of turning it into a mix-use race machine.
Video.title: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Image.alt: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Video.summary: We pick up the power plant for their grassroots racer and start assembling the heart of the beast.
Video.title: Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Video.summary: The Carcass guys continue the build of their grassroots BMW race car.
Video.title: Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Video.summary: Our 2001 BMW race car gets a set of coilovers, as well as big brake upgrade.
Video.title: Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Image.alt: Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Video.summary: Project UnSanctioned gets the roll cage painted and then back to the shop for a stylistic wrap.
Video.title: Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Image.alt: Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Video.summary: We show you painting tips on how to properly prep your aging clear coat for paint.
Video.title: Paint Tech on our Spec Miata

Image.alt: Paint Tech on our Spec Miata
Paint Tech on our Spec Miata
Paint Tech on our Spec Miata

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We're doing a multi-stage 212 CC go-kart engine build to show how to have fun on a budget.
Video.title: Single Cylinder Special

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out a pair of tires testing their Trailblazer SS in a drift like fashion.
Video.title: Drifting Trailblazer

Video.summary: The Drifting Trailblazer gets more muscle under the hood.
Video.title: Drifting Power and Style

Video.summary: Part 3 of the Drifting Trailblazer, the Trailblazer gets a suspension overhaul.
Video.title: Drifting 101

Video.summary: We crew bring in a road worn 1996 4X4 Tahoe with plans to convert it into the two wheel drive version.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1996 Chevy Tahoe continues its conversion with exterior improvements and new wheels and tires.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 2

Video.summary: We take a 2008 Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser and turn it into a budget-friendly Spec Panther racing
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Video.summary: We continue work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification
Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification
Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Video.summary: We finish work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff
Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff
Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff

Video.summary: The Carcass crew heads out to the NCM Motorsports Park for a High Performance Driving Experience!
Video.title: Street Car to Spec Miata Racecar

Image.alt: Street Car to Spec Miata Racecar
Street Car to Spec Miata Racecar
Street Car to Spec Miata Racecar

Video.summary: The Carcass guys start tearing into the Mazda Miata Racecar, making room for a new roll cage.
Video.title: Fabricating a Roll Cage for the Spec Miata

Image.alt: Fabricating a Roll Cage for the Spec Miata
Fabricating a Roll Cage for the Spec Miata
Fabricating a Roll Cage for the Spec Miata

Video.summary: The crew starts tearing into the drivetrain and suspension of their Spec Mazda Miata racecar.
Video.title: Spec Miata Performance Modifications

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: It’s fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban we’re calling “Unbreakable”.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel visit the powder room to freshen up the frame on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 3

Video.summary: We make repairs on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, showing you how to remove rust and pull dents.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 4

Video.summary: A fresh coat of paint helps transform our Chevy Caprice into a not-so-lean, mean, green machine!
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 5

Video.summary: A marriage made in heaven – Our Fat Stack Caprice gets reunited with our updated chassis.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 6

Video.summary: Chrome is where the heart is – Tommy and Joel update the bright work on their ‘71 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 7

Video.summary: We begin to piece our ‘71 Caprice Fat Stack back together, installing glass, hood, and body panels.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 8

Video.summary: We install the cooling system on our ’71 Caprice and then put the pedal to the metal.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 9

Video.summary: We restore the heater box on Fat Stack, and install air conditioning components to make it cool.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Image.alt: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Video.summary: The guys finalize Fat Stack’s transformation from automatic to manual.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 11

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel cut a rug and freshen up Fat Stack’s interior to match the flashy exterior.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 12

Video.summary: The finish line is in sight for Fat Stack with finishing touches and a one-of-a-kind grille.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 13

Video.summary: Our 1971 Chevy Caprice, Project Fat Stack, ROARS to life after almost a year of work.
Video.title: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Image.alt: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: Our Unbreakable Chevy Suburban makes its final preparations for payoff.
Video.title: Unbreakable Readies For The Mountain

Video.summary: The guys put Project Unbreakable, our ’91 Chevy Suburban, to the test at Adventure Off Road Park!
Video.title: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Image.alt: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Video.summary: Come along as we take a massive ‘91 GMC Suburban square body and turn it into a lifted off-road beast.
Video.title: An Unbreakable Suburban Transformation

Video.summary: With new wheels and tires and steering upgrade, the guys take their Chevy Suburban for a drive!
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban Comes To Life
